Traffic Light Controller
  • top
  • pwm_controller
  • Processes
  • p_outputs
  • View page source

p_outputs

Source file: pwm_controller.sv
Source line: 114
Block type: always_comb
Sensitivity list: *

Description

p_outputs: Combinational Moore output decode. PWM output is high when counter is below duty_i threshold. period_done pulses for exactly one cycle when state is DONE. Output truth table: .. code-block:: none

IDLE -> pwm_o=0 period_done=0 COUNTING -> pwm_o=(count < duty_i) period_done=0 DONE -> pwm_o=0 period_done=1

Source

always_comb begin : p_outputs
    pwm_o       = 1'b0;
    period_done = 1'b0;
    case (state)
        IDLE:     begin pwm_o = 1'b0;           period_done = 1'b0; end
        COUNTING: begin pwm_o = (count < duty_i); period_done = 1'b0; end
        DONE:     begin pwm_o = 1'b0;           period_done = 1'b1; end
        default:  begin pwm_o = 1'b0;           period_done = 1'b0; end
    endcase
end
